title: cli.py: slide add, delete, and move commands
description: Wire `pypptx slide add`, `pypptx slide delete`, and `pypptx slide move` into the `slide` subgroup. Validate that exactly one of `--duplicate`/`--layout` is provided for `add` (fail with stderr message and exit code 1 otherwise). Call the corresponding `ops.slides` write functions. Format output via `output_result()`.
acceptance_criteria: `pypptx slide add deck.pptx --duplicate 1` outputs `{"added_file": "slideN.xml", "position": N}`; resulting file opens correctly.
`pypptx slide add deck.pptx --layout 1 --position 2` inserts at position 2 and outputs correct JSON.
`pypptx slide add` with both or neither `--duplicate`/`--layout` writes an error to stderr and exits non-zero.
`pypptx slide move deck.pptx 3 1` outputs `{"file": "slide3.xml", "from": 3, "to": 1}`; slide order is correct.
All three commands support `--plain` for human-readable output.
Errors go to stderr; exit code is non-zero on failure.
